---
title: "Sub-Ångstrom 3D Resolution, Volume Imaging Beyond the Depth of Focus Limit, and Automated Tomography Using Electron Ptychography"
type: "article"
author: "P. Pelz, S. You, M. Wu, N. Palatkin"
year: "2025"
publication: "Microscopy and Microanalysis 31"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1093/mam/ozaf048.041"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - ptychography
  - tomography
  - atomic resolution
  - imaging
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Sub-Ångstrom 3D Resolution, Volume Imaging Beyond the Depth of Focus Limit, and Automated Tomography Using Electron Ptychography
P. Pelz, S. You, M. Wu, N. Palatkin
Microscopy and Microanalysis 31


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
